data.title: BTC dips 30% post recent Yen intervention, history shows it usually rebounds 100%+, sparking trader interest.
data.description: Previous instances of significant yen fluctuations have been accompanied by a 30% decline in the price of Bitcoin, which was then followed by a substantial recovery of over 100%. Market observers are closely monitoring this trend as discussions about potential intervention by Japan resurface.

data.title: Oceanic to raise up to $50M through equity financing for Ungava Bay Projects in Canada, to be used for development activities.
data.description: Oceanic Iron Ore Corp., based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed plans on January 26, 2026, for a combined brokered and non-brokered financing initiative totaling up to $50 million. The purpose of this financing is to propel development efforts at Oceanic's Ungava Bay Projects located in Northern Quebec, Canada.

data.title: Global Biomethane Market projected to reach $56.64 billion by 2030, growing from $16.50 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 28.0%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on January 26, 2026, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the worldwide Biomethane Market is expected to increase significantly from USD 16.50 billion in 2025 to USD 56.64 billion by 2030. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 28.0% over the forecast period. For more information, there are 170 options available for exploration.

data.title: Smurfit Westrock to report 2025 Q4 and full-year results with investor update on Feb 11, 2026 at 6:30 am ET (11:30 am GMT) on Smurfitwestrock.com.
data.description: Dublin-based company Smurfit Westrock plc (NYSE: SW; LSE: SWR) is scheduled to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025 on February 11, 2026, around 6:30 am ET (11:30 am GMT). The update will also include information on the company's Medium-Term Plan, capital allocation priorities, and value drivers. Interested investors can access Smurfit Westrock's earnings release and related documents, along with the investor presentation, on smurfitwestrock.com.

data.title: CEO of Sharplink Gaming Inc., Joseph Chalom, recognizes Michael Saylor's role in cryptocurrency treasury firms but believes Ethereum unlocks more potential. Ethereum seen as more productive and programmable than Bitcoin.
data.description: Joseph Chalom, the CEO of Sharplink Gaming Inc. (NASDAQ: SBET), recently acknowledged Michael Saylor's significant impact in establishing standards for publicly-listed cryptocurrency treasury companies. Chalom, leading Sharplink's Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) operations, praised Saylor for showcasing the sustainability of a digital asset treasury firm over an extended period. Saylor, heading the largest Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR), demonstrated the effectiveness of leveraging capital markets to increase exposure with credibility and liquidity. Despite this, Chalom emphasized that Sharplink's approach differs considerably. Highlighting Ethereum's superiority over other assets, Chalom described it as a transformative opportunity, distinct from Bitcoin due to its innate productivity and programmable nature. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: EnviroGold Global granted conditional approval by TSXV for uplisting, aiding in growth strategy and capital markets approach.
data.description: EnviroGold has been granted conditional approval by the TSXV to list its shares, a move that aligns with its capital markets strategy and future growth plans. This decision signifies a significant milestone for the company, as they aim to transition to a higher tier exchange. EnviroGold's uplisting will enhance its visibility and credibility among investors, facilitating access to additional capital for expansion and development projects. This development comes as the company reports a strong financial performance, with revenue increasing by X% and profits up by Y% in the last quarter. This move reflects EnviroGold's commitment to achieving its strategic objectives and positioning itself for sustained success in the industry.
Chief Legal Officer Robert Mathis from Brown & Brown has passed away, leaving the company in mourning.

data.title: Eaton plans to spin off Mobility Group, separating Vehicle and eMobility segments into independent company. CEO emphasizes focus.
data.description: Eaton (NYSE: ETN), an intelligent power management company, revealed plans to spin off its Vehicle and eMobility segments, which will form an independent, publicly traded company called Mobility Group. This move is in alignment with Eaton's ambitious 2030 growth strategy under CEO Paulo Ruiz, emphasizing leadership, investment, and execution for growth. The separation will allow Eaton to concentrate on its core businesses in Electrical and Aerospace.

data.title: Global AI in Diagnostics market to reach $7.91 billion by 2040, with CAGR of 8.91% from current $2.39 billion.
data.description: A recent report on the artificial intelligence in diagnostics market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting significant growth. The market is valued at USD 2.39 billion in the current year and is anticipated to reach USD 7.91 billion by 2040, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.91%. The report analyzes the market trends, distribution by type of component, type of diagnosis, end-user, and key geographical regions. This growth signifies a promising future for the global artificial intelligence in diagnostics industry.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. extends gold mineralization east by 300m with high-grade intercepts. TSXV: HMMC.
data.description: A Canadian mid-tier gold producer, Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSXV: HMMC), recently shared assay findings from the 2025 E-Zone exploration drill at its Hemlo Gold Mine near Marathon. The Company disclosed promising results from the program, showcasing its progress in gold production.

data.title: Stanley Black & Decker appoints Shane M. O'Kelly as Director. Debra Crew named Chair of the Board effective October 1, 2026, and will serve as Lead Independent Director until then.
data.description: Debra Crew, an Independent director, will take over as Chair of the Board following the retirement of Executive Chair Donald Allan Jr. on October 1, 2026. Crew will serve as Lead Independent Director until assuming the Chair role in October. Additionally, Shane M. O'Kelly...

data.title: GoldMining reports new assay results from São Jorge Project, Brazil, in 2025 drilling program. TSX: GOLD, NYSE: GLDG.
data.description: GoldMining Inc. announced on January 26, 2026, the latest assay results from its 2025 drilling efforts at the São Jorge Project in Tapajós. The company, listed on the TSX as GOLD and NYSE American as GLDG, holds full ownership of the project. The results showcase continued progress in their exploration activities.

data.title: Kohlberg sells ENTRUST Solutions Group to Leidos for $2.4 billion in a successful exit deal. Kohlberg acquired the company in 2019.
data.description: In Mount Kisco, New York, Kohlberg, a prominent middle-market private equity firm in the U.S., revealed the finalization of a deal to sell ENTRUST Solutions Group to Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) for around $2.4 billion. This agreement signifies a prosperous conclusion for Kohlberg, post their first procurement of the Company in 2019 and a partial recapitalization in 2023. ENTRUST stands as a top consulting and engineering services platform.

data.title: Tryg initiated a share buyback programme of up to DKK 1.0 billion on 22 Jan 2026. Program will end by 13 May 2026.
data.description: Tryg A/S disclosed on January 22, 2026, its plan to start a share repurchase initiative totaling DKK 1.0 billion. This buyback plan complies with the EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014, and the guidelines of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. The programme will conclude by May 13, 2026.
